title: Affordable CRISPR RNP‐Based Genome Editing in Euglena gracilis
author: Minami, Shimizu, et al.
materials: Sterile Erlenmeyer flasks, 100 ml (e.g., CTE33, Iwaki) fitted with silicone plugs
Sterile conical tube for measuring KH liquid medium, 50 ml
pH meter (e.g., pH Meter D‐52, HORIBA)
Autoclave for sterilization of media (e.g., LBS‐245, TOMY)
Incubator set to 26°C with 50 µmol photons m−2s−1 white light (e.g., Panasonic, MLR‐352H‐PJ)
Rotary shaker (e.g., multishaker MMS, EYELA) placed in the incubator
